titleStmt.title: SII 36.223: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 223. (A.R. No. 223 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: Grant of tax free land measuring 400 kuḻis to the temple of Tiruvallidāyam in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam for maintaining two twilight lamps (chandhi viḷakku) by two individuals, namely Tirumalaiyuḍiayāṉ and Uyyavandāṉ. The land was earlier purchased from the dēvadāṉa village in a public auction for a consideration of 3 aṉṟāḍu-naṟ-paḻankācu. The śivabrāhmaṇs accepted the money and agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 vatu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Ikkoṭṭattu tirumaṅ
kalaṅkiḻār kaṉmikaḷil kāraikiḻāṉ tirumalaiyuṭaiyāṉum Ivūrilyirukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ Uyyavantāṉum Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa pāṭiyilyiṉ
ṉāyaṉār tirunāmakkāṇiyāṉa nilattil Ērivāyil Añcupaṭṭi paṟṟil vaṭakkil taṭiyiraṇṭil kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟināl kuḻi nāṉūṟum Iṟaiyiḻicci vilai Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅ
kācu 6 Ippaḻaṅkācu Āṟuyikum Inilam nāṉūṟum taṇṭeśvaravilaiyākak koṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku cantirātittavaraiyiraṇṭu cantiviḷakku Erippatākak koṇṭu vi
ṭṭom Ivviruvom Iṉṉilam nāṉūṟum Ikkoyilil civappirāmaṇar kaik koṇṭu cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭum cantirātittavarai Erikka kaṭavarkaḷ
Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 36.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
